sentences.translation: Adilov telefon je bio veoma spor.
Pitao je brata zašto je spor.
sentences.translationEn: He asked his brother why it was slow.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ لَهُ الْأَخُ: احْذِفِ الصُّوَرَ الْقَدِيمَةَ وَسَتَكُونُ أَسْرَعَ.
sentences.translation: Brat mu je rekao: Obriši stare fotografije i bit će brži.
sentences.translationEn: The brother told him: Delete the old photos and it will be faster.

sentences.arabic: حَذَفَ عَادِلٌ الصُّوَرَ وَأَصْبَحَ الْهَاتِفُ أَسْرَعَ.
sentences.translation: Adil je obrisao fotografije i telefon je postao brži.
sentences.translationEn: Adil deleted the photos and the phone became faster.
